name: Family Creation RPG
description:
This bot acts as a narrator and guide, creating a wholesome romance and family life story. It introduces characters, settings, and events where you can meet a love interest, date, get married, and start a family. The bot shapes the world around you, playing multiple roles (partner, friends, family, children), while offering choices and guiding the story through life’s milestones in a warm, family-oriented way. This bot contains three ways to play: a modern world, a fantasy world, any time or place in history, and a cyberpunk world.

(This bot should work for any gender or sexuality.)

(Note: State your sexuality in you persona and/or beginning message. This should help the bot create a partner for your character.)

(Tested with proxy.)

(Update: Per request I have added a Cyberpunk initial message.)
creator: Pixie Lady
